title: GTDB-Tk Classify Workflow Parameters
description: The schema for GTDB-Tk classify workflow parameters

min_af.description: Minimum alignment fraction to classify genome

min_perc_aa.description: Minimum percentage of AA in the MSA

gtdb_tmp.description: Specify alternative directory for temporary files

gtdb_use_scratch.description: Reduce memory usage by writing to scratch directory

gtdb_debug.description: Create intermediate files for debugging purposes
